violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Cake stored uncovered below walk in freezer fans.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Drip from walk in cooler fan's drain pan (Vegetable walk in cooler).--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Some floor debris below shelves of walk in freezer. -Dried residue at floor below cup storage at self service beverage station.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — ---Damp cloth at coffee station being used to polish silver ware.--Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Sani Bucket near burger station was visibly cloudy.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Gaskets at multiple refrigeration doors had black residue build up. -Some rice spill in cabinet below student self serve/cook area. -Residue at hand sink handle of deli sandwich center station. -Some residue at handles of sandwich station refrigeration. *Low touch surfaces due for deep clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Black debris build up at floor/refrigeration edge where door transition was removed. -Debris/residue build up on floors below equipment throughout kitchen. -Floor drain below ice machine visibly soiled.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
